mainEntity.name: Do you provide fema/fdi advisory services in Telangana?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Telangana from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

mainEntity.name: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Telangana?

acceptedAnswer.text: Companies registered in Telangana fall under ROC Hyderabad. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Telangana-registered companies.

mainEntity.name: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Telangana?

acceptedAnswer.text: Stamp duty in Telangana: 0.15% on authorised capital. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
